title: @everyoneonthisboard / @everyoneonthisworkspace - Request option to disable, move, or relabel

posts.author: NinjaMastaMcGee (Megan Goodrich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Feature request to disable, move, or relabel @everyoneonthisboard / @everyoneonthisworkspace during updates.

What are you trying to achieve

Although having the option to contact everyone on a board or a workspace is helpful, there are often parties who, regardless of access, should not be receiving communications that are not intended for them. Please incorporate an option to disable @everyoneonthisboard and/or @everyoneonthisworkspace.

If disabling the feature is not an option, please consider moving those two tags to another location or relabeling the tags as it is currently very easy to choose the incorrect tag when you’re moving quickly, especially with ‘initiative’ falling in the middle alphabetically. Suggestions for relabeling include @allboardusers and @allworkspaceusers; this would quickly alleviate confusion compared to @everyoneonthisinitiative. Thanks in advance!

posts.author: xavier65frans (xavier)
posts.cookedHtml:
NinjaMastaMcGee:

Feature request to disable, move, or relabel @everyoneonthisboardeve@everyoneonthisworkspaceyoneonthisboard / @everyoneonthisworkspace during updates.

What are you trying to achieve

Although having the option to contact everyone on a board or a workspace is helpful, there are often parties who, regardless of access, should not be receiving communications that are not intended for them@everyoneonthisboard Please @everyoneonthisworkspacencorporate an option to disable @everyoneonthisboard and/or @everyoneonthisworkspace.

If disabling the feature is not an option, please consider moving those two tags to another location or relabeling the tags as it is currently very easy to choose the incorrect tag when you’re moving quickly, especially with ‘i@allboardusersitiat@allworkspaceusersve’ falling in the middle alphabetically. Suggestions for relabeling include @allboardusers and @allworkspaceusers; this would quickly alleviate confusion compared to @everyoneonthisinitiative. Thanks in advance!

Hello,

Although the ability to contact everyone on a board or within a workspace is useful, there are many situations where certain parties—despite having access—should not receive broad or unintended communications. To address this, it would be extremely helpful to include an option to disable the @everyoneonthisboard and/or @everyoneonthisworkspace tags entirely. If disabling these tags is not feasible, an alternative could be to move them to a different location in the mention list or relabel them to reduce accidental use. Currently, it is very easy to select the wrong tag when working quickly, especially since similar options appear close together alphabetically. Renaming them to something clearer, such as @allboardusers and @allworkspaceusers, would significantly reduce confusion compared to labels like @everyoneonthisinitiative. Thank you for considering this improvement.
